mapper.select: SELECT reportno, memberno, report_type AS reportType, report_period AS reportPeriod, positive, negative, neutral, anxious, depressed, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM emotion_report WHERE reportno = #{reportno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emotion_report ( reportno, memberno, report_type, report_period, positive, negative, neutral, anxious, depressed, updated_at ) VALUES ( emotion_report_seq.NEXTVAL, #{memberno}, #{reportType}, #{reportPeriod}, #{positive}, #{negative}, #{neutral}, #{anxious}, #{depressed}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE emotion_report SET positive = #{positive}, negative = #{negative}, neutral = #{neutral}, anxious = #{anxious}, depressed = #{depressed}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE reportno = #{reportno}
mapper.select: SELECT result, score, TO_CHAR(rdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS rdate FROM ( SELECT result, score, rdate FROM Twoweek_test WHERE memberno = #{memberno} ORDER BY rdate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
